scripts.dev: set -a && . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a && case "$DATABASE_URL" in file:*) npm run dev:sqlite ;; *) npm run dev:postgres ;; esac
scripts.dev:sqlite: concurrently -n server,client -c green,magenta "npm run dev:sqlite:server" "npm run dev:sqlite:client"
scripts.dev:sqlite:server: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npm run dev
scripts.dev:sqlite:client: cd client && npx wait-on http://localhost:3000/api/health && npx vite --host
scripts.dev:postgres: concurrently -n db,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:postgres:db" "npm run dev:postgres:server" "npm run dev:postgres:client"
scripts.dev:postgres:db: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DOCKER_CONTEXT=$DEV_DOCKER_CONTEXT docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up db
scripts.dev:postgres:server: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && ./docker/wait-for-db.sh && cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev && npm run dev
scripts.dev:postgres:client: cd client && npx wait-on http://localhost:3000/api/health && npx vite --host
scripts.dev:docker: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DOCKER_CONTEXT=$DEV_DOCKER_CONTEXT docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.dev:docker:down: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DOCKER_CONTEXT=$DEV_DOCKER_CONTEXT docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down
scripts.dev:docker:migrate: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DOCKER_CONTEXT=$DEV_DOCKER_CONTEXT docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec server npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.test: echo 'Run individual test suites: test:db, test:server, test:client, test:e2e'
